The Terminal (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $77,073,959Details
International Box Office $141,600,000
Worldwide Box Office $218,673,959
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $386,133
Total $386,133
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$19,053,199 (24.7% of total gross)
Legs:4.05 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:35.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$75,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,811 opening theaters/2,914 max. theaters, 5.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $148,438,741

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 18th, 2004 (Wide) by Dreamworks SKG
International Releases: September 9th, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: May 6th, 2014 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for brief language and drug references.
Running Time: 128 minutes
Plot point: Flight Attendant, Government Bureaucracy, Immigration, Language Barrier, Relationships Gone Wrong
Source material: Inspired by a True Story
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: DreamWorks Pictures, Amblin Entertainment, Parkes+Macdonald Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English, French, Russian, Italian, Bulgarian
